name: aodhclient

metadata.name: aodhclient
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
==========
aodhclient
==========

Python bindings to the OpenStack Aodh API

This is a client for OpenStack Aodh API. There's a `Python API
<https://docs.openstack.org/python-aodhclient/latest/api.html>`_ (the
aodhclient module), and a `command-line script
<https://docs.openstack.org/python-aodhclient/latest/shell.html>`_ (installed
as aodh). Each implements the entire OpenStack Aodh API.

* Free software: Apache license
* Release notes: https://releases.openstack.org/teams/telemetry.html
* Documentation: https://docs.openstack.org/python-aodhclient/latest/
* Source: https://opendev.org/openstack/python-aodhclient
* Bugs: https://storyboard.openstack.org/#!/project/openstack/python-aodhclient

functions.name: aodhclient.utils.cli_to_array
documentation:
Convert CLI list of queries to the Python API format.

This will convert the following:
    "this<=34;that=string::foo"
to
    "[{field=this,op=le,value=34,type=''},
      {field=that,op=eq,value=foo,type=string}]"

methods.name: aodhclient.shell.AodhShell.build_option_parser
documentation:
Return an argparse option parser for this application.

Subclasses may override this method to extend
the parser with more global options.

```
param description

full description of the application

paramtype description

str

param version

version number for the application

paramtype version

str
```

methods.name: aodhclient.tests.functional.base.ClientTestBase.details_multiple
documentation:
Return list of dicts with item details from cli output tables.

If with_label is True, key '__label' is added to each items dict.
For more about 'label' see OutputParser.tables().

NOTE(sileht): come from tempest-lib just because cliff use
Field instead of Property as first columun header.

Base class for aodhclient tests.

Establishes the aodhclient and retrieves the essential environment
information.

classes.name: aodhclient.noauth.AodhNoAuthPlugin
documentation:
No authentication plugin for Aodh

This is a keystoneauth plugin that instead of
doing authentication, it just fill the 'x-user-id'
and 'x-project-id' headers with the user provided one.

functions.name: aodhclient.exceptions.from_response
documentation:
Return an instance of ClientException on an requests response.

Usage:

```
resp, body = requests.request(...)
if resp.status_code != 200:
    raise exception_from_response(resp)
```

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.ClientException

methods.name: aodhclient.exceptions.ClientException.code
documentation: NOTE(jd) for backward compat
The base exception class for all exceptions this library raises.

documentation: The base exception for ClientExceptions that use Retry-After header.

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.MutipleMeaningException
documentation: An mixin for exception that can be enhanced by reading the details

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.BadRequest
documentation: HTTP 400 - Bad request: you sent some malformed data.

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.Unauthorized
documentation: HTTP 401 - Unauthorized: bad credentials.

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.Forbidden
documentation:
HTTP 403 - Forbidden:

your credentials don't give you access to this resource.

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.NotFound
documentation: HTTP 404 - Not found

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.MethodNotAllowed

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.NotAcceptable
documentation: HTTP 406 - Not Acceptable

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.Conflict

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.OverLimit
documentation:
HTTP 413 - Over limit:

you're over the API limits for this time period.

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.RateLimit
documentation:
HTTP 429 - Rate limit:

you've sent too many requests for this time period.

classes.name: aodhclient.exceptions.NotImplemented
documentation:
HTTP 501 - Not Implemented:

the server does not support this operation.

methods.name: aodhclient.v2.alarm_history.AlarmHistoryManager.get
documentation:
Get history of an alarm

```
param alarm_id

ID of the alarm

type alarm_id

str

param limit

maximum number of resources to return

type limit

int

param marker

the last item of the previous page; we return the next
results after this value.

type marker

str

param sorts

list of resource attributes to order by.

type sorts

list of str
```

methods.name: aodhclient.v2.alarm_history.AlarmHistoryManager.search
documentation:
List of history matching corresponding query

```
param query

The query dictionary

type query

dict
```

methods.name: aodhclient.v2.alarm.AlarmManager.list
documentation:
List alarms.

```
param filters

A dict includes filters parameters, for example,
{'type': 'gnocchi_resources_threshold',

source:5: (ERROR/3) Unexpected indentation.

'severity': 'low'} represent filters to query alarms

source:6: (WARNING/2) Block quote ends without a blank line; unexpected unindent.

with type='gnocchi_resources_threshold' and
severity='low'.

type filters

dict

param limit

maximum number of resources to return

type limit

int

param marker

the last item of the previous page; we return the next
results after this value.

type marker

str

param sorts

list of resource attributes to order by.

type sorts

list of str
```

methods.name: aodhclient.v2.alarm.AlarmManager.query
documentation:
Query alarms.

```
param query

A json format complex query expression, like this:
'{"=":{"type":"gnocchi_resources_threshold"}}', this
expression is used to query all the
gnocchi_resources_threshold type alarms.

type query

json
```

```

ID of the alarm

type alarm_id

```
